stops.name: Christiansen-Graham-Rest-Area
stops.source: OpenStreetMap/Overpass development-time corridor amenity query, accessed 2026-06-21; curated into a gameplay POI (clean name, normalized category) without raw OSM IDs.

stops.name: Love's Travel Stop Hardin
stops.source: Love's official store feed lists store 679 in Hardin, MT on I-90, exit 495/Hwy 47; at_mi estimated by projecting source coordinates onto checked-in route geometry (6.4 mi from simplified corridor line), accessed 2026-06-17: https://www.loves.com/api/fetch_stores

stops.name: Orin Junction Truck Stop
stops.source: OpenStreetMap/Overpass development-time corridor amenity query, accessed 2026-06-21; curated into a gameplay POI (clean name, normalized category) without raw OSM IDs.

stops.name: Dwyer Junction Rest Area
stops.source: OpenStreetMap/Overpass dense in-gap corridor amenity query, accessed 2026-07-19; added to close a stretch with no truck-accessible service after the truck-accessibility sweep. Curated into a gameplay POI (clean name, normalized category) without raw OSM IDs. Truck parking confirmed by the FHWA Jason's Law inventory (USDOT BTS NTAD Truck Stop Parking, compiled 2019), which lists Dwyer Junction Rest Area with 20 truck parking spaces on this corridor, accessed 2026-07-17: https://geodata.bts.gov/datasets/usdot::truck-stop-parking/about
